inquiry.title: Partnership inquiry
inquiry.desc: Leave your adoption goals and operating environment. This is a demo form configured to review a proposal flow.

municipality.title: Municipal partnership inquiry
municipality.desc: Based on local industry, workforce status, and existing operations, we configure a delegated model for post-arrival co-education, adaptation and safety checks, and change support.

legal.title: AI legal support flow
legal.desc: Worker's native-language input → situation summary → guidance on documents and procedures → operations center review → expert referral when needed.

report.title: Policy report structure
report.desc: A screen to configure which indicators are collected weekly, monthly, and quarterly, and which information is provided as de-identified summaries.

form.name: Contact name
form.note: This template form is a demo. In production, apply a separate privacy policy, consent, and access control system.
form.submitNote: Your input has been confirmed. In a live integration, this connects to a responsible email or CRM intake flow.
form.messagePlaceholder: Please enter adoption region, industry, target scale, and priority issues to address.

meta.title: Global Workforce Operations
meta.description: Municipality-delegated integrated foreign workforce operations platform template

hero.title:
From post-arrival through
stable settlement,
we manage it together.
hero.copy: A platform template that connects municipal policy with company sites to manage co-education, adaptation and safety checks, and job/worksite change support in one operating system.
hero.note: ※ This screen is an introduction and proposal template for Global Workforce Operations.

education.title: Post-arrival co-education
education.desc: On-site adaptation education that companies and workers start together

safety.title: Adaptation & safety status checks
safety.desc: Checks focused on early detection and support linkage, not surveillance

transfer.title: Job & worksite change support
transfer.desc: Flow management from consultation, deadlines, and documents through re-adaptation checks

report.title: Municipal policy reporting
report.desc: Turn field data into de-identified indicators and operational outcomes

mandate.title:
We make the core tasks delegated by municipalities
work in the field.
mandate.copy: Global Workforce Operations is not recruitment—it is a professional operations model that systematically supports post-arrival adaptation, safety, and change tasks and reports operational outcomes.

card1.title:
Post-arrival
employer co-education
card1.copy: Workers receive multilingual life, safety, labor basics, and job manuals; company contacts receive initial adaptation support, multilingual work instructions, and on-site safety standards.

card2.title:
Adaptation & safety checks
and early support
card2.copy: We identify early risk signals such as incomplete training, work/life difficulties, safety concerns, and conflicts, understand causes in the worker's language, and connect to support, counseling, and follow-up checks.

card3.title:
Job & worksite change
task support
card3.copy: From change-intent counseling through procedure, deadline, and document guidance, company coordination, and 30·60·90-day re-adaptation checks after change—we record and manage the full flow.

cycle.title:
Not a one-time intake—
we manage the entire settlement journey.
cycle.copy: A flow that does not miss early-arrival anxiety and on-site adaptation issues, and reconnects workers to a stable environment when change is needed.

step1.title: Arrival & company placement
step1.copy: Register basic profile, language, industry, company, and region, and set the initial operating path.

step2.title: Co-education & manuals
step2.copy: Workers and company contacts confirm their roles and on-site standards, and completion history is saved.

step3.title: 7·30·90-day adaptation checks
step3.copy: Check adaptation, safety, living, and communication status and connect needed support early.

step4.title: Change & re-settlement support
step4.copy: When job or worksite change is needed, guide procedures and re-check adaptation after the change.

education.title:
We deliver industry-specific on-site manuals
in the worker's language.
education.copy: We go beyond translated documents—designing multilingual training with images, diagrams, audio, short video, and comprehension checks for real on-site use.

feature1.title: Multilingual manuals for workers
feature1.copy: Before, during, and after work; protective equipment; actions in accidents; help request paths

feature2.title: Company contact co-education
feature2.copy: Initial adaptation support, work instructions, conflict prevention, on-site safety management standards

feature3.title: Training completion & re-training management
feature3.copy: Comprehension checks, incomplete-training alerts, re-training classification, municipal report integration

langSupport.title: Support for 8 worker languages: Sinhala, English, Chinese, Filipino, Thai, Urdu, Uzbek, Kyrgyz
langSupport.languages: Sinhala · English · Chinese · Filipino · Thai · Urdu · Uzbek · Kyrgyz

support.title:
Before abnormal signs,
we detect adaptation difficulties.
support.copy: We do not treat workers' difficulties as simple attrition risk—we identify causes in work, safety, living, and communication and connect to support paths.

dashboard.title:
The same field data,
viewed through role-appropriate screens.
dashboard.copy: Companies get prevention and compliance; municipalities get policy indicators and operational outcomes; the operations center gets case management and follow-up flows.

operations.title: Operations center integrated status
operations.subtitle: Sample screen · case management and reporting focus

report.title:
We turn field data
into policy decision materials.
report.copy: Reporting should not control individual workers—it should identify improvement points in education, adaptation, safety, and change tasks. Default is de-identified summaries; details are separated by permission and consent.

point1.title: Weekly operations report
point1.copy: New arrivals & placement, incomplete training, urgent support & follow-up check status

point2.title: Monthly management report
point2.copy: Co-education, adaptation checks, company management, and change task outcomes and action rates

point3.title: Quarterly policy report
point3.copy: Regional demand, industry-specific issues, operational outcomes, next-quarter improvement proposals

mail.title: July 2026 foreign workforce integrated management monthly report

cta.title:
Start an operating system where foreign workers adapt safely
and companies and regions grow together.
cta.copy: Global Workforce Operations connects co-education, adaptation support, change tasks, and policy reporting in one screen and operating process, based on the real flow of municipal delegated tasks.

card.title: Worker integrated management card
card.subtitle: Individual education · consultation · checks · change history

timeline2.title: Living & work adaptation check
timeline2.desc: Housing, transport, on-site communication status check

timeline3.title: Follow-up after consultation request
timeline3.desc: Support linkage and next check date recorded

legal.title:
When a problem arises,
we organize it first in your language.
legal.copy: AI Legal Buddy does not determine legal outcomes. It organizes your situation, guides required documents and steps, then connects to the operations center and expert support.
legal.item2: Industrial safety, accidents, work environment concerns
legal.item3: Stay & change procedures and required documents

analysis.title: Individual consultation & analysis guidance
analysis.step1: ① Record situation, symptoms, and requests in your language.
analysis.step2: ② Classify risk signals (safety, living, communication) and set priority.
analysis.step3: ③ Guide support, consultation, and follow-up paths and notify the next schedule.

app.title:
Manufacturing · Press work
Today's safety guide
app.taskDesc: Wear protective gear first and check hazards around the machine.
app.check3: How to call a supervisor in an accident
